summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 1 warning, 8 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 bin/lib/flows.mjs:202 — Brittle bracket round-trip on `SIMPLICITY_VETO_TAG`. Strips `[ ]` then re-wraps; if the constant's format changes, the produced string no longer contains `SIMPLICITY_VETO_TAG` and `hasSimplicityVeto` silently misses the veto. Export a separate `SIMPLICITY_VETO_LABEL` and derive the tag from it.
🔵 bin/lib/synthesize.mjs:48 — Optional: add an integration-shaped test wiring `mergeReviewFindings → parseFindings → computeVerdict` for a simplicity-🔴 to lock the end-to-end invariant.
- Tests: 573/573 pass, including `simplicity-only 🔴 → FAIL with [simplicity veto] tag preserved`
